Let’s talk about my “Giant frog” Dump’s eyes and why they sometimes look different. Dumpy is an Australian whites tree frog and like most frogs she is nocturnal, and because of this her eyes are very good at seeing in the dark, frogs pupils will expand to let in much more light then a humans eye can. Depending on how much light is around her her eyes will adapt by opening and closing the pupil giving the eye a completely different appearance. This is why Dumpy’s eyes may appear different throughout our videos. If you would like to learn more about my “Giant” pet frog tap on the folder at the the bottom of this video. Consider hitting the plus icon, and check out what else I’m up to. We appreciate your support. #giantfrog #dumpytreefrog  #petfrog #frogeyes #learnontiktok
